twitter.copy: Discover the trusted choice for safe drinking water! Bisleri leads the category with 130 operational plants, 5980 distributors, and 8270 trucks. Stay hydrated with the best! #Bisleri #TrustedChoice #SafeDrinkingWater

instagram.copy: Are you looking for a drinking water brand you can trust? Bisleri has been a household name in India for decades, delivering safe, pure, and healthy drinking water with a strong footprint of 130 operational plants, 5980 distributors, and 8270 trucks. Stay hydrated with the best! #Bisleri #TrustedChoice #SafeDrinkingWater
